textByHash.aa7983d45b564ae5673bedee5c68ce0fed82e481: Aha! Are you here to parley?
textByHash.019e00f097a176a9b93655bb9ac89deb6af69ea5: I parley everywhere! I haven't encountered a single problem I've not been able to parley my way out of.
textByHash.60f790cfbc4c794d54b32c7398dea794889cca9d: That's right! Whenever I run into trouble, I just shout parley! To be honest with you, I don't know the first thing about actually being a pirate. All my wealth just comes from parleying all the time.
textByHash.b7e60075a952cfa4ff249f07ba931cdde6ecf9c1: Nonsense! At the rate I'm going, I'm going to be the greatest pirate ever to have lived! Parley! Parley! Parley!
